dict.string: Reado Anywhere serves your review pages to your phone over your local network. Nothing leaves your network.
Reado opens code and docs from projects you keep in your Documents folder.
Reado opens code and docs from projects you keep on your Desktop.
Reado opens code and docs from projects you keep in your Downloads folder.
Reado opens code and docs from projects stored on network volumes.
Reado opens code and docs from projects stored on removable drives.
